title: Nvidia-Backed Robotics Company Goes Public Via SPAC. Shares Briefly Jump 30%.
full_text:
Amazon Stock Slips Below Key Level. Why It's A Rough Day For Cloud Hyperscaler Stocks.

6/25/2026 Amazon stock broke below its 200-day line as it continued a slump that has wiped out its rally from April.
